channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news aggregator - Tier 1 global headlines and Tier 2 regional analysis

item.title: 🇦🇺⛽ Australia forces gas giants to reserve 20% for domestic market
item.description: Australia will require LNG exporters to reserve 20% of their gas for the domestic east coast market to avert supply shortfalls and lower energy bills amid global energy disruptions from the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇹🇼 China condemns Eswatini for being "kept and fed" by Taiwan
item.description: Beijing used unusually strong language against Taiwan's remaining African ally, saying Eswatini's leaders are being "kept and fed" by Taipei as diplomatic tensions rise.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Zelensky announces legislation to legalize private military companies in Ukraine
item.description: Ukraine is preparing laws to establish private military companies, creating postwar opportunities for veterans and expanding Kyiv's role in the global security sector.

item.title: 🌏⚡ ASEAN leaders gather in Philippines amid Middle East energy crisis
item.description: ASEAN summit in Cebu focuses on energy security and Middle East tensions, with fuel import-dependent Southeast Asian economies facing significant challenges from the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Expands Influence Across Asia as Iran War Creates Energy Crisis
item.description: The Iran war has left China's neighbors appealing for energy help, handing Beijing the regional sway it has long sought. Countries across Asia are turning to China as fuel shortages bite.

item.title: 🇹🇼 US Massing Troops Near Taiwan to Deter Chinese Aggression
item.description: America is building up military forces near Taiwan as a deterrent against potential Chinese adventurism during the Iran crisis. The deployment signals US commitment to the Indo-Pacific despite Middle East demands.

item.title: 🇷🇴 Russian Drone Attacks Spill Into NATO Territory in Romania
item.description: Four years of war in Ukraine is taking a toll on neighboring Romania as Russian drones repeatedly cross into NATO territory. Residents live with the constant threat of weapons of war entering their airspace.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Private Payrolls Post Largest Gain in 15 Months Despite Middle East Uncertainty
item.description: US private payrolls rose significantly in April, pointing to continued labor market stability even as the Iran conflict clouds the economic outlook. The data suggests resilience in the American economy.

item.title: 🛢️ US fires on Iranian oil tanker amid war pressure
item.description: US military forces fired on an Iranian oil tanker as the Trump administration continues to pressure Tehran for a deal to end the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan's last Trump diehards lose faith as Iran war chaos spreads
item.description: Japan's once-ardent Trump supporters are questioning their allegiance as the Iran conflict disrupts global trade and energy supplies that Japan depends on.

item.title: 🌏 India navigates Iran war diplomacy between US, Pakistan and Middle East
item.description: India faces complex diplomatic challenges as the Iran conflict intensifies, balancing relations with Washington, Islamabad, and Gulf states while protecting its energy interests.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Hormuz crisis threatens Taiwan's silicon shield
item.description: Japan analyzes how Iran's disruption of the Strait of Hormuz impacts Taiwan's semiconductor industry and the island's strategic importance in global technology supply chains.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇺🇦🇺🇸 US-Iran War Reshapes Great Power Politics
item.description: Analysis: The Iran conflict is fundamentally altering the global power balance, creating new alliances and exposing weaknesses in the international order.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Israel strikes Beirut for first time since ceasefire
item.description: Israel carried out airstrikes on Beirut on Wednesday, marking the first such attack since a ceasefire was established. Lebanon's PM said any high-level meeting with Israel would be premature.

item.title: 🇰🇵 North Korea declares it is no longer bound by nuclear non-proliferation treaty
item.description: North Korea stated it is not bound by any treaty on non-proliferation of nuclear weapons, according to KCNA, raising concerns about Pyongyang's nuclear ambitions.

item.title: 🇰🇵 North Korea revises constitution to drop references to Korean unification
item.description: North Korea has amended its constitution to remove language calling for reunification with South Korea, signaling a hardening of Pyongyang's stance toward its southern neighbor.

item.title: ⛪ Pope Leo to meet Rubio as Trump escalates attacks on pontiff
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is scheduled to meet with Pope Leo as President Trump continues his criticism of the pontiff over Vatican policy positions.

item.title: 🏛️ CNN founder Ted Turner dies at 87
item.description: Ted Turner, the media mogul who founded CNN and revolutionized television news, has died at age 87. Turner transformed how the world consumes news.

item.title: 🇫🇷 French aircraft carrier group moving into Red Sea amid Iran tensions
item.description: France's carrier strike group is heading toward the Red Sea as part of preparations for a potential mission to secure the Strait of Hormuz amid the ongoing conflict with Iran.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan's Nikkei surges past 41,000 for first time
item.description: Japanese stocks rallied on optimism about a potential Iran peace deal, with the Nikkei breaking through 41,000 points for the first time in its history.

item.title: 🇻🇪 Venezuela tells World Court it has no jurisdiction in Guyana oil dispute
item.description: Venezuela argued before the International Court of Justice that the court lacks jurisdiction in its territorial dispute with Guyana over oil-rich regions.

item.title: 🇪🇺 ECB rate hike chances rise amid inflation concerns
item.description: European Central Bank board member Cipollone indicated that the probability of a rate hike has increased as inflationary pressures persist in the eurozone.

item.title: ⚔️ US lists offensive cyberattacks in counterterrorism strategy
item.description: The Pentagon has formally included offensive cyber operations as part of its counterterrorism strategy, marking a shift in how the US approaches digital warfare.

item.title: 🇮🇶🇺🇸 Iran War: US and Iran near peace deal
item.description: The US and Iran appear close to reaching a peace agreement that could end the conflict, with both sides engaging in diplomatic talks while maintaining military pressure.
